[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110110 4
1 1110111 6
2 0001000 1
3 1011000 3
4 1101110 5
5 1100000 2
6 1010000 2
7 0000100 1

01 10 1010100 3
12 21 0011011 4
23 32 0101101 4
34 43 1011010 4
45 54 1010010 3
56 65 0001010 2
67 76 1100100 3
70 07 0000100 1 match 7

02 20 1001111 5
13 31 0110110 4 match 0
24 42 1110111 6 match 1
35 53 0001000 1 match 2
46 64 1011000 3 match 3
57 75 1101110 5 match 4
60 06 1100000 2 match 5
71 17 1010000 2 match 6

14 41 1101100 4

36 63 0000010 1
47 74 0111100 4
50 05 1101010 4
61 16 0110100 3
72 27 1001011 4

26 62 0101111 5
37 73 1100110 4
